## NormalizedFrontmatter type

Detached deep-readonly frontmatter with a required public URL.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type NormalizedFrontmatter<TFrontmatter extends object> = {
    readonly [TKey in keyof (Omit<TFrontmatter, 'url' | 'rawUrl'> & ContentRecord)]: DeepReadonly<(Omit<TFrontmatter, 'url' | 'rawUrl'> & ContentRecord)[TKey]>;
};
```
